ck_pick_source_one_ref.name: ck_pick_source_one_ref
ck_pick_source_one_ref.value:
("pick_list_source"."source_type" = 'ZOHO_SO' AND "pick_list_source"."zoho_so_id" IS NOT NULL AND "pick_list_source"."manual_order_doc_id" IS NULL)
       OR ("pick_list_source"."source_type" = 'MANUAL_ORDER' AND "pick_list_source"."manual_order_doc_id" IS NOT NULL AND "pick_list_source"."zoho_so_id" IS NULL)
